title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 30 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 30 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 30 2026
summary:
Main
Today, the DCE Iron ore futures strengthened today, with the most-traded contract I2609 closing at 796 yuan/mt,up 1.60% from the previous trading session. Spot prices rose 2-5 from the previous day. Traders showed moderate enthusiasm in quoting, while steel mills restocked on an as-needed basis with limited inquiries; overall spot transactions were tepid.
